Title: User logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" in the username field.
2. User enters "testpassword" in the password field.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the main page.

Title: User logs in with incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" in the username field.
2. User enters "wrongpassword" in the password field.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message indicating incorrect password.

Title: User logs in with empty fields
Test Steps:
1. User leaves both fields empty.
2. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message indicating required fields.

Title: User registers successfully
Test Data: Username: testuser, Password: testpassword, PrivacyAccepted: Yes
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" in the username field.
2. User enters "testpassword" in the password field.
3. User accepts the privacy policy.
4. User clicks the register button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the main page and a success message is displayed.

Title: User registers with existing username
Test Data: Username: testuser, Password: testpassword, PrivacyAccepted: Yes
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" in the username field.
2. User enters "testpassword" in the password field.
3. User accepts the privacy policy.
4. User clicks the register button.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message indicating the username is already taken.

Title: User modifies profile successfully
Test Data: New Username: testuser2, New Email: testuser2@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the profile icon.
2. User clicks on the "Modify Info" button.
3. User enters "testuser2" in the username field.
4. User enters "testuser2@example.com" in the email field.
5. User clicks the save button.
Expected Result: User's profile is updated and a success message is displayed.

Title: User modifies profile with invalid email
Test Data: New Username: testuser2, New Email: invalidemail
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the profile icon.
2. User clicks on the "Modify Info" button.
3. User enters "testuser2" in the username field.
4. User enters "invalidemail" in the email field.
5. User clicks the save button.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message indicating the email format is invalid.

Title: User inserts a new item
Test Data: Item Name: TestItem, Item Description: This is a test item.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Insert Item" button.
2. User uploads an image for the item.
3. User enters "TestItem" in the name field.
4. User enters "This is a test item" in the description field.
5. User clicks the save button.
Expected Result: Item is inserted into the database and a success message is displayed.

Title: User deletes an item
Preconditions: User has an item in the list.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Delete Item" button next to "TestItem".
2. User confirms the deletion.
Expected Result: Item is removed from the list and a success message is displayed.

Title: User proposes a new exchange
Test Data: Item Name: TestItem, Exchange Partner: testpartner
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Propose Exchange" button.
2. User selects "TestItem" as the item to exchange.
3. User selects "testpartner" as the exchange partner.
4. User clicks the submit button.
Expected Result: Exchange proposal is saved in the database and a success message is displayed.

Title: User accepts an exchange proposal
Preconditions: User has received an exchange proposal.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Accept" button next to the exchange proposal.
2. User confirms the acceptance.
Expected Result: Exchange status is updated to accepted and a success message is displayed.

Title: User rejects an exchange proposal
Preconditions: User has received an exchange proposal.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Reject" button next to the exchange proposal.
2. User confirms the rejection.
Expected Result: Exchange status is updated to rejected and a success message is displayed.

Title: User filters items by category
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Filter" button.
2. User selects "Electronics" from the category dropdown.
3. User clicks the apply button.
Expected Result: Filtered list of items is displayed.
